category_title: Pupils with minimal or no speech who primarily communicate through non-verbal requests
scenario_title: Engaging in rough and tumble play and music activities
minimal_context: The student and tutor are in a 1:1 interaction session focusing on music and rough and tumble play activities.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for our music activity. Sit down in the chair and listen to the song.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Ignores the adult, keeping their head turned away and looking at the wall.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Look at me. You need to clap your hands to the music.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Makes a brief protesting sound and continues to ignore the adult's instructions.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Stand up now, let's do some rough and tumble play together.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Immediately protests loudly at the command, turning completely away from the adult to avoid the interaction.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for our music activity. Sit down in the chair and listen to the song.

STUDENT: (Ignores the adult, keeping their head turned away and looking at the wall.)

TUTOR: Look at me. You need to clap your hands to the music.

STUDENT: (Makes a brief protesting sound and continues to ignore the adult's instructions.)

TUTOR: Stand up now, let's do some rough and tumble play together.

STUDENT: (Immediately protests loudly at the command, turning completely away from the adult to avoid the interaction.)

task.content: Engaging in all kinds of rough and tumble play, singing, and music
task.learning_goal: Improve communication skills by using these activities during the interaction sessions

context.social_setting: One-on-one interaction with a classroom adult

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Immediately followed their adults' directive communication
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Ignoring or protesting at what the adults did or said
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Did not like demands and expectations placed on them

behavior_patterns.condition: When adults direct the interaction, seek the child's attention more than follow the interest of the child, or give more commands than suggestions
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Ignoring or protesting at a rate ranging from 0.42 - 4.6 incidences per minute
